case_title: YAN WEI CHEN VS. WILLIAM WAI LAM WONG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHEN, YAN WEI AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, WILLIAM WAI LAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-26-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, WILLIAM WAI LAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, YAN WEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, WILLIAM WAI LAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
